This is a utility class that generates bogus IP addresses that are out of range actually.
Connection
Model representing a DB-API connection.
ConnectionProtocol
 
ConnectionProtocolField
 
Cpe
A representation of the Common Platform Enumeration (CPE) in Nmap output.
CpeItem
Class to retain the required fields of a CPE Items.
CpeItemsSynchronizationService
 
CPENameBinder
The CPENameBinder class is a simple implementation of the CPE Name binding algorithm, as specified in the CPE Naming Standard version 2.3.
CPENameMatcher
The CPENameMatcher is an implementation of the CPE Matching algorithm, as specified in the CPE Matching Standard version 2.3.
CPENameUnbinder
The CPENameUnBinder class is a simple implementation of the CPE Name unbinding algorithm, as specified in the CPE Naming Standard version 2.3.
CpeScanException
 
CpeScanService
Represents and handles the list of currently running scans.
CpeSearch
 
CpeServices

Nmap4j
This is the simplified way to execute and parse Nmap output.
NMap4JParserEventListener
 
NMapExecutionException
Thrown when IOException occurs when calling execute() on NMapExecutor.
NMapExecutor
A simple class that encapsulates executing NMap.
NMapExecutorThread
An implementation of the Runnable interface capable of running an NMapExecutor instance.
NMapInitializationException
This exception is thrown when the NMapExecutor is initialized and the host is not one of the supported OS's.
NMapProperties
This class is used to manage the path to nmap.
NMapRun
This class maps to the root element of NMap's XML output.
NMapRunHandlerImpl
 
NmapServices
 
NMapXmlHandler
This class is the implementation of the DefaultHandler and receives notifications from the SAX parser when nodes are parsed.
NMapXmlObsfucator
This class is an implementation of the SAX parser's DefaultHandler which basically receive's notifications of nodes from the SAX parser as nodes are encountered.
NoLogging
 
NVDCPEMatch
 
OkResult
 
OnePassParser
The OnePassParser takes a document and parsers it all the way through and returns a tree of Objects that represent the XML that was just parsed.
Os
 
OsClass
 
OsMatch
 
PaginatedSynchronizationService<T>
Abstract class for paginated data synchronization services.
PaginatedSynchronizationService.PostSend
Annotation for methods that should be executed after sending data to the DB-API.
PaginatedSynchronizationService.PreSend
Annotation for methods that should be executed before sending data to the DB-API.
Pair<T,U>
Immutable object representing a pair or objects.

Service
 
Service
Generic Service with a name, description, a configuration file and an API command.
ServiceDiscovery
A ServiceDiscovery instance is used to scan a host or hosts to list all the services the host is running, using NMap's default port specification.

Model to represent a SNMPv2c connection.

SNMPv3ConnectionField
 
SNMPv3PrivacyAlgorithm
 
SocketMessageMQTTHandler
 
SourceCodeLineCounter
This class counts the number of source code lines by excluding comments, in a Java file The pseudocode is as below Initial: Set count = 0, commentBegan = false Start: Read line Begin: If line is not null, goto Check, else goto End Check: If line is a trivial line(after trimming, either begins with // or is ""), goto Start If commentBegan = true if comment has not ended in line goto Start else line = what remains in the line after comment ends commenBegan = false if line is trivial goto Start If line is a valid source code line, count++ If comment has begun in the line, set commentBegan = true goto Start End: print count
SshConnection
 
SshConnectionField
 
SshUtils
 
State
 
StaticConnectionProtocol
 
Status
 
StatusNotifier
Handle the status notifications, collects them from registered status providers and, if necessary, sends them on the server's WebSocket.
StatusService
Control the status notifications, mostly allow to remotely control the sending of them.
